section_name: Prohibition on Taking Specimen if Person Refuses; Exception
text: Except as provided by Section 724.012 (Taking of Specimen) (a-1) or (b), a specimen may not be taken if a person refuses to submit to the taking of a specimen designated by a peace officer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.013 — Prohibition on Taking Specimen if Person Refuses; Exception

Except as provided by Section 724.012 (Taking of Specimen) (a-1) or (b), a specimen may not be taken if a person refuses to submit to the taking of a specimen designated by a peace officer.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1024 (H.B.558), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.text: Except as provided by Section 724.012 (Taking of Specimen) (a-1) or (b), a specimen may not be taken if a person refuses to submit to the taking of a specimen designated by a peace officer.
